name: Tortellini and Smoked Turkey
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Red or yellow bell pepper, chopped
4 oz Smoked turkey, cut into bite-sized pieces
4 oz Green beans, trimmed and cut into 1-inch-long pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water for tortellini and green beans to boil in a covered pot.
2. Heat a nonstick skillet until very hot. Reduce heat to medium-high and add oil. Sauté onion until it begins to brown.
3. Chop peppers and add them to the onion with hot pepper flakes. Cook until peppers are soft.
4. Cut turkey into bite-sized pieces and place in a serving bowl.
5. Wash, trim, and cut green beans into 1-inch-long pieces. Place green beans and tortellini in boiling water and cook for 3 to 4 minutes; drain.
6. Wash and dry greens. With the food processor running, put garlic through the feed tube.
7. Squeeze lemon juice into the processor and add yogurt, chutney, and mustard. Process until fully blended.
8. Drain green beans and tortellini, then add them to the turkey in the bowl with onion, pepper, and dressing. Mix everything together.
9. Arrange greens on a serving dish and top with salad.
